title: Governance item (GET /governance)
description: One agent's cost/rate governance state — the BudgetLight and fleet strip. As-built source of truth: apps/control-plane/src/governance.rs (Light, Usage, BudgetGrant, Tier, FleetMode; state persisted in Phase 1 — today in-memory in the Governor). Per-agent items join the agent's Usage report with its live BudgetGrant lease and derived Light. `grant_expires_epoch` serves BudgetGrant.expires_epoch; a missing/expired grant serves granted_tokens/grant_expires_epoch null and light=red (no live grant = nothing budgeted). The fleet-wide pool summary is the $defs/pool object, returned alongside the items (envelope extension field `pool`). Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

light.description: Traffic light: green < 70% of grant, yellow >= 70% (downgrade fires here, BEFORE the 429), red >= 90% or any rate-limit hit or no live grant.

tokens_spent.description: Tokens spent in the current governance window (Usage.tokens_spent).

granted_tokens.description: The agent's live budget grant (BudgetGrant.granted_tokens); null = no live grant.

grant_expires_epoch.description: Epoch seconds the grant lease expires (BudgetGrant.expires_epoch — unspent budget returns to the pool); null = no live grant.

tier.description: Model tier the agent is CURRENTLY running (self-reported via its manager; Usage.tier); null = not reported this window.

rate_limit_hits.description: Rate-limit (429) hits in the current window (Usage.rate_limit_hits). Any hit = red.

last_rate_limited_epoch.description: Epoch seconds of the most recent rate-limit hit; null (as-built 0) = none. Feeds cascade detection.

pool.description: Fleet-wide pool summary (one object per read, not per agent). pool_tokens = Governor.pool_tokens (the per-window fleet pool); pool_spent = sum of live grants' spend (derived — the as-built Governor exposes pool_available(); pool_spent = pool_tokens - available - unspent-granted remainder is computed by the serving layer); fleet_mode/cascade_active from Governor.fleet_mode() (sequential when >= 3 agents rate-limited within 300s). Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

pool_tokens.description: Fleet-wide token pool per governance window.

pool_spent.description: Tokens spent fleet-wide in the current window.

fleet_mode.description: sequential = cascade detected: agents run one-at-a-time until the window clears.

cascade_active.description: true iff fleet_mode=sequential (convenience boolean for the fleet strip).
